caption: A man with a shaved head, a dark beard, and a tattoo on his right arm is recording in a studio with dark, ribbed sound-absorbing foam walls. He wears black headphones and a white t-shirt. A professional microphone, labeled " Rode NT1-A", is positioned in front of him, held by a shock mount and boom arm. Throughout the sequence, the man speaks and gestures with his left hand, which is raised and open in front of him. His expression shifts from a focused look with a closed mouth to one of surprise or emphasis, with his mouth open. His left hand moves slightly closer to his face as he continues to speak. The background and equipment remain static while the man's facial expressions and hand placement evolve.
